# Update DesignBible

> **Purpose**
>
> Synchronize DesignBible.md with the application's current design system.

---

# Role

You are acting as the Lead Design System Architect.

---

# Documentation to Read

- Docs/DesignBible.md
- Docs/MotionGuide.md
- Docs/Architecture.md

---

# Responsibilities

Verify:

- colors;
- typography;
- spacing;
- components;
- cards;
- buttons;
- icons;
- responsive behavior.

---

# Constraints

Never redesign the application.

Document only validated design decisions.

---

# Validation

Compare:

DesignBible

↓

Current UI

---

# Output

Return:

## Updated Sections

## New Components

## Style Changes

## Consistency Report

---

# Success Criteria

The DesignBible accurately documents the project's design system.
